note: Pinned SHA values are populated by bench/fetch.sh on first run. Re-run fetch.sh to update.

wordpress.description: Canonical untyped PHP — procedural, hook-driven, minimal type declarations. The null end of the type-density x-axis.

symfony-string.description: PHP 8.2+, strict_types throughout — densest clean typed code. Injection substrate for E2.

phpunit.description: Evaluate the clone tool on its own author's ecosystem. PHPStan-max-clean. Symbolically apt for a phpcpd lineage paper.

php-parser.description: Typed and well-understood. Dep used by the type-density metric itself.

firefly-iii.description: Laravel app running Larastan MAX — confirmed high type-density. Accumulates duplicated controllers, form requests, validation blocks. The typed-and-cloney quadrant.
